user_question: Identifier les communes où la dette (champ 'D001') a augmenté de plus de 10% entre 2023 et 2024.
gold_sql: WITH dette_2023 AS (SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS valeur FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2023'), dette_2024 AS (SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS valeur FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024') SELECT d23.city_name, d23.valeur AS dette_2023, d24.valeur AS dette_2024, ROUND((d24.valeur - d23.valeur) * 100.0 / d23.valeur, 2) AS evolution_pct FROM dette_2023 d23 JOIN dette_2024 d24 ON d23.city_name = d24.city_name WHERE d24.valeur > d23.valeur * 1.10;
generated_sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       d2023.value AS debt_2023,
       d2024.value AS debt_2024,
       ((d2024.value - d2023.value) / d2023.value) * 100.0 AS growth_percent
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results d2023 ON d.document_id = d2023.document_id AND d2023.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d2023.document_year = '2023'
JOIN extraction_results d2024 ON d.document_id = d2024.document_id AND d2024.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d2024.document_year = '2024'
WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
  AND CAST(d2023.value AS REAL) > 0
  AND ((CAST(d2024.value AS REAL) - CAST(d2023.value AS REAL)) / CAST(d2023.value AS REAL)) * 100.0 > 10
ORDER BY growth_percent
reasoning_quality_gen: The SQL logic is incorrect because it joins extraction_results on document_year, but document_year is a column in the documents table, not in extraction_results. user_question: Détection des anomalies : communes où les dépenses (DF01) dépassent 150% des recettes (RF01) en 2024.
gold_sql: SELECT dep.document_id, dep.value AS depenses, rec.value AS recettes FROM (SELECT er.document_id, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS value FROM extraction_results er WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND er.document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024')) dep JOIN (SELECT er.document_id, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS value FROM extraction_results er WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND er.document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024')) rec ON dep.document_id = rec.document_id WHERE dep.value > rec.value * 1.5;

       SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF01' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_depenses,
       SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'RF01' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_recettes,
       (SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF01' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 /
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'RF01' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END),0)) AS depense_par_recette

JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY d.city_name

        1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'RF01' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END),0)) > 1.5

user_question: Quelles communes ont vu leurs dépenses de fonctionnement (DF01) augmenter de plus de 15% entre 2023 et 2024 ?
gold_sql: WITH depenses_2023 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS df01 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2023'), depenses_2024 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS df01 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2024') SELECT d.city_name, ((d2024.df01 - d2023.df01) / d2023.df01) * 100 AS evolution_pourcentage FROM documents d JOIN depenses_2023 d2023 ON d.siret = d2023.siret JOIN depenses_2024 d2024 ON d.siret = d2024.siret WHERE ((d2024.df01 - d2023.df01) / d2023.df01) > 0.15;
generated_sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       CAST(r2024.value AS REAL) - CAST(r2023.value AS REAL) AS increase_amount,
       ((CAST(r2024.value AS REAL) - CAST(r2023.value AS REAL)) / CAST(r2023.value AS REAL)) * 100.0 AS pct_increase
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r2023 ON d.document_id = r2023.document_id AND r2023.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2023'
JOIN extraction_results r2024 ON d.document_id = r2024.document_id AND r2024.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2024'
WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
  AND CAST(r2023.value AS REAL) > 0
  AND ((CAST(r2024.value AS REAL) - CAST(r2023.value AS REAL)) / CAST(r2023.value AS REAL)) * 100.0 > 15
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
reasoning_quality_gen: The SQL logic correctly identifies communes with DF01 increases >15% between 2023-2024 by joining extraction_results on document_id and filtering by safir_field_id='DF01', document_year, and budget_type='BP'. It selects relevant financial fields (value) and provides complete context (city_name, increase_amount, pct_increase). user_question: Quelles communes ont vu leurs dépenses de fonctionnement (DF01) augmenter de plus de 10% entre 2023 et 2024 ?
gold_sql: SELECT d2024.city_name FROM documents d2024 JOIN extraction_results e2024 ON d2024.document_id = e2024.document_id JOIN documents d2023 ON d2024.siret = d2023.siret JOIN extraction_results e2023 ON d2023.document_id = e2023.document_id WHERE d2024.document_year = '2024' AND d2023.document_year = '2023' AND e2024.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND e2023.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND e2024.value <> '' AND e2023.value <> '' AND (CAST(e2024.value AS REAL) - CAST(e2023.value AS REAL)) / CAST(e2023.value AS REAL) > 0.1
generated_sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       CAST(r2024.value AS REAL) - CAST(r2023.value AS REAL) AS increase_amount,
       ((CAST(r2024.value AS REAL) - CAST(r2023.value AS REAL)) / CAST(r2023.value AS REAL)) * 100.0 AS pct_increase
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r2023 ON d.document_id = r2023.document_id AND r2023.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2023'
JOIN extraction_results r2024 ON d.document_id = r2024.document_id AND r2024.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2024'
WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
  AND CAST(r2023.value AS REAL) > 0

user_question: Quelle est la commune avec la plus forte augmentation de dette entre 2023 et 2024 ?
gold_sql: WITH dette_2023 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(e.value AS REAL) AS dette FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2023'), dette_2024 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(e.value AS REAL) AS dette FROM extraction_results e JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024') SELECT d.city_name, (d2024.dette - d2023.dette) AS augmentation FROM documents d JOIN dette_2023 d2023 ON d.siret = d2023.siret JOIN dette_2024 d2024 ON d.siret = d2024.siret ORDER BY augmentation DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.city_name,
       SUM(CASE WHEN d.document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS total_2023,
       SUM(CASE WHEN d.document_year = '2024' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS total_2024,
       (SUM(CASE WHEN d.document_year = '2024' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) -
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END)) AS growth
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'

HAVING growth > 0

       SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) /
       NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('RF01','RI01') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END),0) AS ratio_d001_total
FROM documents d

HAVING ratio_d001_total IS NOT NULL

user_question: Communes dont la part des investissements dans les dépenses totales (DF011/(DF01+DF011)) dépasse 30% en 2024.
gold_sql: WITH depenses AS (SELECT d.document_id, d.siret, d.city_name, CAST(df01.value AS REAL) AS fonct, CAST(df011.value AS REAL) AS invest FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results df01 ON d.document_id = df01.document_id AND df01.safir_field_id = 'DF01' JOIN extraction_results df011 ON d.document_id = df011.document_id AND df011.safir_field_id = 'DF011' WHERE d.document_year = '2024') SELECT city_name, (invest / (fonct + invest)) * 100 AS part_investissement FROM depenses WHERE (invest / (fonct + invest)) > 0.3
generated_sql:

       SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF01' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) /
